channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Oklahoma Republican Candidate Jackson Lahmeyer Plans to Withdraw After Controversy Over Messages With Former Fundraiser
item.description: Jackson Lahmeyer, a Tulsa megachurch pastor and Republican candidate for Oklahoma's 1st Congressional District, is reportedly preparing to withdraw from the congressional race following revelations ab...

item.title: Alexis Wilkins Scheduled to Perform at U.S.-Sponsored Freedom 250 Event in Brussels
item.description: A report highlighted plans for country singer Alexis Wilkins, the girlfriend of FBI Director Kash Patel, to participate in a U.S.-organized Freedom 250 celebration in Brussels, Belgium, later this sum...

item.title: Former Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene Mocks Trump's Iran Peace Deal and Questions Its Results
item.description: Former Representative Marjorie Taylor Greene, once a prominent supporter of Donald Trump and the MAGA movement, publicly criticized the president's Iran peace agreement in a lengthy video posted on X....

item.title: Georgia GOP Cancels Planned Congressional Redistricting Effort Ahead of 2026 Midterms
item.description: Georgia Republicans have decided not to move forward with a proposed congressional redistricting plan that was expected to be debated during a special legislative session. The proposal would have take...

item.title: Trump Delays DNI Nomination Hearing, Leaving Senate Republicans Frustrated and Uncertain
item.description: President Donald Trump unexpectedly disrupted the confirmation process for Jay Clayton, his nominee to serve as Director of National Intelligence (DNI), causing confusion and frustration among Senate ...

item.title: Tanzania Proposes Mining Fund and Expanded Credit Access to Strengthen Small-Scale Mining Sector
item.description: The Government of Tanzania is considering a series of measures aimed at strengthening the country's small-scale mining industry through improved access to financing, technology, and geological informa...

item.title: Tom Cotton Says Senate Intelligence Committee Will Proceed With Jay Clayton Confirmation Hearing Despite Trump's Objection
item.description: Senate Intelligence Committee Chairman Tom Cotton announced that a planned confirmation hearing for Jay Clayton, President Donald Trump's nominee for Director of National Intelligence (DNI), will move...

item.title: SpaceX Agrees to Acquire AI Coding Company Anysphere (Cursor) in $60 Billion All-Stock Deal
item.description: SpaceX announced that it will acquire Anysphere, the developer of the AI-powered coding platform Cursor, in an all-stock transaction valued at $60 billion. According to the company, the acquisition is...

item.title: Former DHS Official Says Growing European Distrust of U.S. Leadership Was Evident at the 2026 G7 Summit

item.title: MS NOW Ends Live Coverage of Trump's G7 Press Conference and Discusses Claims About Iran Agreement
item.description: During a press conference at the G7 summit, President Donald Trump spoke about a recently announced agreement involving Iran and discussed the impact of actions against Iran's nuclear program. While a...

item.title: Senate Committee Advances Measure to Restrict Pete Hegseth's Travel Funds Pending Pentagon Responses
item.description: A bipartisan group of lawmakers on the Senate Armed Services Committee has approved a provision that would limit Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth's access to official travel funds unless the Pentagon co...

item.title: Opinion Column Uses Reflecting Pool Renovation as Metaphor for Criticism of Trump's Intelligence Leadership Plans
item.description: This opinion article by John Casey draws a parallel between the troubled renovation of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool and what the author views as deeper problems within the Trump administration...

item.title: Report Says Trump Delayed DNI Nominee Hearing After Dispute With Senate Majority Leader John Thune
item.description: According to a report cited by Raw Story from Politico journalist Meredith Lee Hill, President Donald Trump unexpectedly pulled a scheduled confirmation hearing for his nominee for Director of Nationa...

item.title: Rare 1977 Blondie Photoshoot Captured Beneath the Aging Hollywood Sign During the Band’s Rise
item.description: This article revisits a notable 1977 photo session featuring the band Blondie beneath the Hollywood Sign in Los Angeles, California. The photographs were taken by music photographer Richard Creamer wh...

item.title: G7 Leaders Back U.S.-Led Iran Ceasefire Efforts and Show Greater Unity Among Allies
item.description: Leaders attending the Group of Seven (G7) summit expressed support for U.S. President Donald Trump's tentative agreement with Iran aimed at maintaining stability in the Strait of Hormuz and extending ...

item.title: Trump Defends Preliminary Iran Memorandum at G7 Summit and Warns of Military Action if Terms Are Violated
item.description: President Donald Trump responded forcefully to questions about a preliminary memorandum of understanding (MOU) between the United States and Iran while attending the G7 summit in Évian-les-Bains, Fran...

item.title: Morning Joe Panel Questions Trump's Focus on Kennedy Center Naming Dispute Amid Broader Political Challenges
item.description: A discussion on MSNBC's 'Morning Joe' focused on President Donald Trump's attention to the naming controversy surrounding the Kennedy Performing Arts Center in Washington, D.C., with panelists suggest...

item.title: CNN Panel Debate on Georgia GOP Primary Shifts From Culture-War Messaging to Transgender Policy Dispute

item.title: Trump Keeps Bill Pulte as Acting DNI and Announces Cancellation of Planned Senate Confirmation Hearing

item.title: FBI Interview in Epstein Files Describes Alleged Recruitment of Women at Trump Tower in the Early 1990s
item.description: A document contained within the large release of Epstein-related files includes an FBI interview conducted in 2021 with a woman who described events she said occurred at Trump Tower in New York during...
